creator: ler@FreeBSD.org
text:
When I recompiled mutt with this version, the first letter of the folder name gets lost.....

 PAM                       44| 131   + Jun 02 Catherine Rosen ( 45K) FW: Resume for Catherine Rosenman
 acula                      7| 132   + Jun 02 ONE Campaign    ( 16K) Eat (RED). Drink (RED). Save lives.

 ists/SpamAssassin/commit   0| 134   + Jun 02 1Sale.com Deals ( 56K) Get $200 When You Spend $500 - Canon Wireless P
 ists/SpamAssassin/users   12| 135   T Jun 02 Cc FreeBSD-gnat ( 12K) Re: [PATCH] textproc/apache-solr: update to 4.8

 ists/freebsd/amd64         0|


Can you see what's up?

If you need access let me know, and I can arrange it.
